query: 计算Si的结构弛豫，随后做能带和DOS

candidates.llm_reason: Stable diamond cubic structure of Si with energy above hull of 0.0, non-deprecated, and representative bulk entry ideal for structural relaxation and subsequent band structure and DOS calculations.

Metastable phase with energy above hull > 0, less stable and less representative for standard calculations; although non-deprecated, it is not the preferred starting point for structural relaxation and electronic property simulations.

notices: Materials Project search for 'Si' returned 43 matches. Hard filtering kept 2 candidates after near_hull.
MP selector chose mp-149 after LLM ranking over 2 hard-filtered candidates.

tasks.description: 基于弛豫结构的自洽计算
